item.title: All-Kill: Comeback Features The Trickster’s Delusion Map
item.description: All-Kill introduces the neon-drenched Trickster’s Delusion map.

item.title: Springtrap's Perks and Builds: Dead by Daylight Killer Tips
item.description: Springtrap, Dead by Daylight’s new Killer, enters The Fog with 3 unique Perks designed to help you spread terror throughout any Trial. Explore how to use each one to your advantage, craft builds, and apply pressure.
